ogTitle: Kwinana Town Centre vs Kwolyin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kwinana Town Centre and Kwolyin.
heading: Kwinana Town Centre vs Kwolyin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kwinana Town Centre, Western Australia and Kwolyin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kwinana Town Centre has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Kwolyin (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kwinana Town Centre or Kwolyin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kwinana Town Centre has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Kwolyin scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kwinana Town Centre scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Kwolyin scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kwinana Town Centre or Kwolyin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kwinana Town Centre has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
